candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred non-total revenue label with populated values.
Also a revenue line, but explicitly a total and duplicates the non-total revenue row.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes over time; first non-missing should be used.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales / cost-of-revenue line.
Equivalent total row duplicating Cost of Operating Revenue; less preferred because it is a total.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Another total-style cost of revenue row; less preferred than direct operating revenue cost line.
Useful variant but excludes depreciation, so not the fullest reported COGS line.
Component within cost of revenues rather than full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the most direct non-total COGS line and avoided duplicate total rows.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D; best match under SG&A hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, but component rows are not needed when an explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.
R&D line exists but should not be included in XSGA because chosen SG&A row already excludes R&D.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Used the explicit SG&A row per hierarchy rule (a). Did not include R&D because the chosen row explicitly excludes research & development expenses.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line exists, but it appears in the supplemental section and the chosen SG&A row already excludes R&D.
Section header, not a usable expense row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Chosen SG&A row is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses', so XSGA already excludes R&D. Per interaction rule, XRD is left empty to avoid subtracting R&D twice.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct recurring interest expense line.
Equivalent direct interest expense line with identical values; acceptable fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense; selecting it in addition would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of equivalent direct interest expense labels; do not sum both. Later code should take the first non-missing label.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line; excludes minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity label; good fallback.
Appears equal to parent common equity here; acceptable fallback.
Also equal to parent common equity here; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when separate MIB exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent/owner equity labels to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.
Equivalent minority interest label; good fallback.
Income statement allocation item, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet minority interest labels; do not sum both.
